THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAYO, JULIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1020 BUSH STREET, APARTMENT 3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT STAYED PROVIDED DEFT. PAY THE AGREED COSTS & ATTORNEY'S FEE OF $350.00 AT $50./ MO WITH THE CURRENT RENT OF $407.00 COMMENCING THE 1ST OF AUGUST. IF DEFT. FAILS TO COMPLY, PLT. UPON FILING A DECL. CAN APPLY FOR A WRIT OF POSSESSION.
